# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Login to GitHub Packages
        uses: actions/login-github-packages@v1
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Build and deploy
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run build
          npm run deploy:prod
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          publish_dir: ./dist
